subcodes.first_line: Hearken, O My name! Then shine forth from the crimson hill even as musk diffuseth its fragrance from the paradise of thy Lord, the All-Bountiful, the Mighty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اسمع یا اسمی ثم اسطع عن کثیب الحمرا کسطوع المسک عن رضوان ربک المنان العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @call to action, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @love of God, @the power of words; of speech, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
